steps.t: You found a note in Moria pointing you towards Othrikar. You should find someone who knows something about the Secret Stone in Othrikar.
You have discovered the name of the dwarf in Othrikar. You should ask for Rúnvarth.
Rúnvarth can be found in Othrikar. You should talk to Rúnvarth.
Rúnvarth has told you that he needs three items from you. You should discover what these items are.
Rúnvarth can be found in Othrikar. You should talk to Rúnvarth.
Now that you have the key, you must find the keyhole. You should find the keyhole.
You have found the Secret Stone inside Erebor! You should claim the Secret Stone!
King Thorin III can be found in Erebor. You should bring the Secret Stone to King Thorin.
